objective: Teach MedGemma to visually identify Nasi Ambeng, a Javanese-Malay communal festive rice platter with its characteristic side dishes, preparation styles, and cultural serving context in Singapore.

hero_product: photorealistic Javanese-Malay Nasi Ambeng communal rice platter on wooden tray with steamed white rice center and assorted side dishes
Nasi Ambeng kampong glam style festive rice platter with ayam goreng, sambal goreng tempeh, serunding kelapa, bergedil, and hard-boiled egg
Singapore Malay nasi ambeng banquet rice dish served on banana leaf with fried chicken, tempeh sambal, coconut floss, potato patties, and boiled egg

toasted spiced coconut flakes for serunding kelapa
